# Contributing to vhs-decode

Thank you for considering to help vhs-decode, cvbs-decode & hifi-decode or any of the decode projects!

When contributing to this repository, please first discuss the change you wish to make via an issue and if it at all applys to the upstream [ld-decode](https://github.com/happycube/ld-decode). 

Code changes are proposed via [Pull Requests.](https://docs.github.com/en/pull-requests/collaborating-with-pull-requests) which should be ideally intergration ready or atleast cross-platform tested with GitHub Actions builds in your own fork/repository. 

## Using the issue tracker

The [github issue tracker](https://github.com/oyvindln/vhs-decode/issues) is the main
tool for [bug reports](#bugs) and [features requests](#features).  

**Please do not use the issue tracker for misc support.** 

Use [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/pVVrrxd) primary then [Reddit](https://www.reddit.com/r/vhsdecode/) for usage/workflow questions if not already covered inside the [Wiki](https://github.com/oyvindln/vhs-decode/wiki) or the various wikis for dedicated FM RF Archival capture hardware.
